text:
はい、報告おしまいっと。
今日はどうもありがとね。

……あと、最後は
ちょっと愚痴っちゃってごめん。
せっかく手伝ってくれたのにね。

あっ、今日のことはゼノには内緒だよ？
わ、わかってるでしょ！理由は！

それじゃ、また何かあったら
よろし

And that finishes up the report. Thanks for
your help today.

Also... Sorry I started griping at the end
there. I shouldn't have done that when
you were just doing your best to help.

Oh, and not a peep of this to Zeno, okay?
Please don't embarrass me by asking me why.
I'll shout if I need anything again.
